overall.description: A cinematic game engine scene from a third-person perspective showing a samurai warrior in traditional armor and straw hat standing on a wooden balcony of a Japanese temple or shrine. The character observes a dramatic stormy night sky with moonlight breaking through clouds over distant misty mountains, featuring rich blue atmospheric lighting and detailed environmental rendering.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooden temple balcony overlooking mountain vista

events.description: clouds shift slightly allowing more moonlight to break through, illuminating the sky

agents.ego_description: The samurai stands still on the wooden balcony, gazing out at the stormy mountain landscape with subtle breathing and idle animations

entered.detail: Dark wooden railing of the balcony in the immediate foreground
Wooden posts and roof structure of the temple building providing partial shelter
Dramatic dark storm clouds covering most of the sky with dynamic lighting
Silhouetted mountain peaks visible through mist in the distance
Bright moonlight breaking through cloud gaps creating god rays

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a cinematic third-person view of a samurai warrior standing on a traditional wooden temple balcony. The character is silhouetted against a dramatic night sky where moonlight breaks through heavy storm clouds over distant mountains. The scene is atmospheric and static, with only subtle environmental movement in the clouds and the character's idle breathing animation.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot presents a cinematic, atmospheric study of a samurai warrior poised against a turbulent nocturnal landscape. It begins with a third-person view of the warrior standing on a traditional wooden temple balcony, his figure silhouetted against the horizon. As the camera lingers, the dramatic night sky shifts with heavy storm clouds that intermittently part to reveal moonlight over distant, misty mountains. The scene remains focused on this stillness, where the only movement is the subtle drift of the clouds and the rhythmic, idle breathing of the character.
